scope.summary:
Implement the slash command menu: when the operator types '/' at the start of a blank line or after whitespace, an egui popup menu appears listing all insertable block types, embed kinds, templates, and manual-insert commands. Selecting a command executes it via the MT-013 formatting commands or inserts the appropriate node. This is the primary keyboard-driven block-creation surface (Obsidian / Notion parity).

EXPECTED DIFF SHAPE:
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/slash_commands/mod.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/slash_commands/registry.rs (static catalog of all slash commands)
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/slash_commands/menu.rs (egui popup widget)
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/slash_commands/executor.rs (dispatches a selected SlashCommand to the correct MT-013/MT-014/MT-015 handler)
- Extend src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/renderer/input_handler.rs to detect '/' trigger and open slash menu.

REUSE EXISTING WP-011 MODULES: the slash menu is a keyboard-driven command surface analogous to the existing command_palette.rs; reuse command_palette.rs + command_registry.rs patterns for fuzzy-filter/ranking and command dispatch shape, and reuse the accessibility/* helpers (accessibility/registry.rs, accessibility/snapshot.rs) for AccessKit author_id assignment. The embed-prompt modal follows the egui::Window dialog pattern already used by context_menu.rs / context_menu_surfaces.rs. Do not introduce a new command bus; route shared selection/command state through command_registry.rs + event_bus.rs.

SLASH COMMAND CATALOG (registry.rs) - must cover:
  BLOCKS: Paragraph, Heading 1/2/3, Bullet List, Ordered List, Task List, Blockquote, Code Block (prompts for language), Table (prompts for rows/cols), Horizontal Rule.
  EMBEDS: Image embed, Slideshow embed, Album embed, Video embed (each prompts for asset_id / ref_value).
  WIKILINKS: Insert Link ([[...]] wikilink - opens autocomplete from MT-015), Insert Transclusion.
  TEMPLATES: (extensible stub) 'Daily Note Template', 'Meeting Notes Template' - insert predefined DocJson snippets.
  MANUAL INSERT: any raw node JSON (advanced; for swarm agent use).

Each SlashCommand { id: &'static str, label: &'static str, description: &'static str, keywords: &'static [&'static str], category: SlashCategory, action: SlashAction } where SlashAction is an enum variant (SetBlock(NodeKind), InsertNode(fn() -> BlockNode), OpenEmbedPrompt(EmbedKind), OpenWikilinkAutocomplete, InsertTemplate(TemplateId)).

MENU WIDGET (menu.rs):
- Trigger: '/' typed at start of empty paragraph or after whitespace. The '/' character itself is kept in the text until the command is selected or Escape is pressed.
- Filter: as the operator continues typing after '/', filter the catalog by label/keywords (case-insensitive substring match).
- Render: egui popup window at caret position. Items grouped by SlashCategory. Each row: icon glyph (text placeholder) + label + description in smaller text. Up/Down arrows move selection; Enter executes; Escape cancels and leaves the '/' in the text.
- Fuzzy match: implement a simple 2-pass filter (exact prefix match ranked first, then substring match).
- AccessKit: popup = author_id = 'slash-menu', each item row = 'slash-item-{id}', Role::MenuItem, Actions::Click.
- Max 20 items shown; scrollable if more match.

EXECUTOR (executor.rs):
- Before executing, remove the '/' trigger text (and any typed filter text) from the DocModel via a DeleteText transaction.
- Then dispatch: SetBlock -> call MT-013 formatting::commands::set_block_kind; InsertNode -> build the node and issue an InsertNode transaction; OpenEmbedPrompt -> open a modal dialog (egui::Window) with an input field for ref_value then call MT-014 logic; OpenWikilinkAutocomplete -> activate MT-015 autocomplete state; InsertTemplate -> fetch the template DocJson snippet and insert its blocks.

STEP-BY-STEP:
1. Define SlashCommand structs and the static SLASH_COMMANDS slice in registry.rs.
2. In input_handler.rs, detect '/' keypress: check that the char immediately before the caret is whitespace or the paragraph is empty; if so, set RichEditorState.slash_menu = Some(SlashMenuState { filter: String::new(), selected: 0, items: SLASH_COMMANDS.to_vec() }).
3. While slash_menu is Some, subsequent printable keys append to filter and re-run the filter; Backspace that deletes the '/' closes the menu.
4. In menu.rs, render the popup with the filtered + ranked items.
5. On Enter/click, call executor::execute_slash_command(selected_command, doc, undo, selection).
6. Cargo tests: detect '/' trigger sets slash_menu; filter 'head' returns only Heading commands; Enter on 'Heading 1' sets block kind; Escape clears slash_menu.
7. Assign AccessKit ids to all menu items.

DEPENDENCIES: MT-011 (InsertNode/DeleteText transactions), MT-012 (caret position for popup), MT-013 (formatting commands for block type changes), MT-014 (embed insertion), MT-015 (wikilink autocomplete activation).
acceptance_criteria: Typing '/' at the start of an empty paragraph opens the slash menu popup (kittest interaction test).
Typing '/' in the middle of existing text does NOT open the slash menu (cargo test verifying the trigger condition).
Filtering by 'head' shows only the Heading 1/2/3 entries (cargo test on the filter fn).
Selecting 'Heading 2' via Enter sets the current paragraph to NodeKind::Heading(2) and removes the '/' trigger text (cargo test).
Escape closes the slash menu and leaves the '/' character in the text at the caret position (cargo test).
AccessKit: 'slash-menu' popup with Role::Menu is present when menu is open (kittest).
Each menu item row 'slash-item-{id}' has Role::MenuItem in the accessibility tree (kittest).
InsertTemplate for 'Daily Note Template' inserts a predefined non-empty DocJson snippet into the document (cargo test with a mock template).
OpenEmbedPrompt for image embed opens a modal input dialog; entering a valid asset_id and confirming inserts an EmbedNode (kittest).
All cargo tests for slash_commands module pass with 0 failures.
proof_targets: cargo test -p handshake-native -- slash_commands outputs 'test result: ok'.
kittest screenshot saved to src/frontend/handshake_native/tests/screenshots/mt016_slash_menu_open.png showing the popup with grouped items.
kittest screenshot saved to src/frontend/handshake_native/tests/screenshots/mt016_slash_menu_filtered.png showing 'head' filter with 3 heading items.
implementation_notes: The static SLASH_COMMANDS slice must use &'static str for all string fields to avoid heap allocation on every frame. Use a const or lazy_static if needed.

The filter algorithm: first pass collects items where label.to_lowercase().starts_with(filter_lower); second pass collects remaining items where label.to_lowercase().contains(filter_lower) or any keyword matches. Concat and deduplicate.

The '/' trigger detection must check the character at caret - 1 in the rope. If caret is at position 0 or the character at caret - 1 is whitespace (including newline), the trigger fires. Use Rope::char() for this check.

The embed prompt modal (for image/video/slideshow/album) is a simple egui::Window with a single TextEdit for the ref_value and an Ok/Cancel button pair. This is not a file picker; the operator types or pastes the asset_id directly.

Templates in this MT are hardcoded DocJson snippets defined in registry.rs as const JSON strings. A future MT can make them user-editable. The two required templates are: 'Daily Note Template' (a heading + 3 bullet items) and 'Meeting Notes Template' (a heading + agenda list + action items table).

KERNEL_BUILDER gate 2026-06-22 (MT-016 = slash command MENU, a UI surface - NOT backend round-trip; model/transform amendments were moved to MT-020 SaveToFormat where the model must be backend-complete). SCREENSHOTS mt016_slash_menu_*.png MUST go to the EXTERNAL Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-test/wp-kernel-012-mt-016/ root via external_artifact_dir() + assert_no_local_artifact_dir() - NOT repo-local (pipeline fails on git ls-files src/**/*.png). Reuse the WP-011 command_palette.rs fuzzy-filter/dispatch pattern + accessibility/registry.rs. ACCESSKIT VARIANT: Role::Menu/MenuItem - field-correct nearest accesskit 0.21.1 (if Menu/MenuItem literals differ, use closest, e.g. List/ListItem); ACs assert author_id. Module root is rich_editor/ not rich_text/ (real tree).

INLINE-ATOM INSERT NOTE (KERNEL_BUILDER gate): the slash executor's OpenEmbedPrompt/OpenWikilinkAutocomplete paths insert inline atoms (hsLink) reusing MT-014/MT-015 logic, which currently mutate children DIRECTLY (NOT undoable) because MT-011 Step::InsertNode only handles Child::Block. MT-016 does NOT need to fix that here - the transform-completeness fix is carried to MT-020. SetBlock/InsertNode(block) paths ARE transactional/undoable. Snapshot caret+filter length before delete (MC-003); close menu on focus loss (MC-004); don't fire '/' inside URLs/paths (MC-001).
ports_from_react: app/src/lib/editor/editor_commands.ts (EDITOR_COMMANDS array categories 'block', 'embed', 'link', 'template' - slash menu items are derived from these same categories)
app/src/components/RichTextEditor.tsx (slash menu trigger logic is part of the Tiptap extension set in build_editor_extensions.ts; the native equivalent is this MT's input_handler detection)
binds_backend_api: No direct backend API calls in this MT. Embed prompt ref_value is handed to MT-014 asset_resolver. Template snippets are hardcoded JSON in this MT.

risks: Slash trigger fires in the middle of a URL (e.g. 'https://foo.com/bar') and interrupts normal typing.
Filter algorithm is O(n) on every keystroke and the SLASH_COMMANDS catalog grows to 100+ entries, causing visible lag.
Execute deletes more text than the '/' + filter length if the DeleteText step is computed from a stale caret position.
The slash menu popup remains open after the editor loses focus (e.g. user clicks outside the window), blocking input to other surfaces.
minimum_controls: Trigger condition must additionally check that the '/' is not preceded by a non-whitespace character that is part of a URL or path (check for ':', '.', '/', letters); a cargo test with 'http://foo' input verifies no menu opens.
Filter is O(n) but n < 50 for the initial catalog; add a SLASH_COMMANDS_MAX_COUNT const assertion (static_assertions crate) to prevent catalog growth past 100 without review.
The executor must snapshot the caret position and the filter text length immediately before executing; compute the delete range from those values, not from the live selection which may have changed.
The slash menu must close when the egui widget's is_focused() returns false (checked in rich_editor_widget.rs update loop); cargo test with simulated focus loss verifies slash_menu is set to None.

implementation_result.implemented_by: KERNEL_BUILDER folded pipeline wf_697fcc39 (impl + adversarial-review PASS, no harden)
commits: ed24a35b feat MT-016 slash command menu
implementation_result.proofs: AC-1..10 GREEN; 41 slash unit + 9 integration + 737 lib; clippy clean; slash menu (Blocks/Embeds/Links grouped popup + descriptions + Paragraph selected) + 'head' filter (3 headings) visually verified; trigger URL-guard (MC-001), focus-loss-close (MC-004); embed prompt inserts hsLink atom (ref_kind=images); screenshots EXTERNAL (git ls-files src/**/*.png empty).
implementation_result.surfaced_regression: MT-016's full-suite check (git-stash-isolated) surfaced a PRE-EXISTING MT-015 regression: 12 full-widget tests (test_embeds 6 / test_formatting_toolbar 3 / test_rich_editor_widget 3) were RED since MT-015 because the backlinks panel showed an auto-repainting egui::Spinner in the Idle/headless-Loading state -> harness.run() max_steps. KERNEL_BUILDER fixed it (commit c976dfbd) - see MT-015. MT-016 itself = zero regression (proven via baseline).
